details: Beginning self-reflection analysis of rms_norm pipeline run

Read all breadcrumbs (4 agents), REPORT.md, .tdd_state.json, op_design.md, pipeline-improvements.md, all 3 kernel files, program_descriptor.py, phase0_discovery.md, phase3_builder.md, 3 analysis docs. No execution_log.md files or op_spec.md found.

Timeline built. Phase 1: 13m, Phase 2: 8m, Phase 3: 9m, Phase 4: 111m. Phase 4 breakdown: data_pipeline 6m, square_reduce_rsqrt 12m, normalize 6m, gamma 87m (still in_progress). Gamma debugging consumed 78% of total pipeline time.

Completed deep analysis of all 5 issues. Root causes identified: (1) design ambiguity on CB reuse for gamma, (2) NONE vs ROW broadcast confusion, (3) kernel cache masking real test results, (4) device contention blocking verification, (5) CB3 page count underspecified in design. Now writing report.

Self-reflection report written to self_reflection.md. 4 new issues added to pipeline-improvements.md (#12-#15). Top findings: (1) CB reuse across phases caused 87min debugging spiral, (2) DPRINT side effects masked synchronization bugs, (3) design deliberation text created implementation ambiguity.
